_comment: Spec-side fragment that pairs with examples/embed.json. The parent screen declares structure.embeds[] in addition to its normal sections; the embedded 'order_detail' screen needs NO spec changes. doc_validate_spec checks regionId/screen naming, params binding resolution, events handler existence, and navigationMode enum.

metadata.name: Dashboard
metadata.description: Tablet dashboard with a master list and an embedded order detail pane.

uiVariables.name: selectedOrderId
uiVariables.description: Currently selected order id from the master list.

viewModel.description: Dashboard VM owns selection and reacts to embed events.
